infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ArgiDrop needs your location to match you with nearby delivery jobs and share your live position with merchants during active deliveries.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: ArgiDrop tracks your location during active shifts so merchants and recipients can see live delivery progress, even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ArgiDrop uses the camera to scan delivery QR codes and capture proof-of-delivery photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ArgiDrop lets you upload KYC documents and proof-of-delivery photos from your library.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: ArgiDrop saves delivery receipts to your library when you tap save.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: ArgiDrop needs your location to match you with nearby delivery jobs.

plugins.cameraPermission: ArgiDrop needs camera access to scan QR codes and capture proof of delivery.
ArgiDrop needs camera access to scan delivery QR codes.
